violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the exterior bar area were blocked by miscellaneous bar tools. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of the slicer and interior ice machines were observed with an accumulation of food and/ or residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned during time of inspection. Ice machines were taken out of service; ice machines to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Service call was placed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Exterior walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in exterior walk-in cooler and backsplashes of various sinks (caulking observed in poor repair affecting cleanability) have an accumulation of residue and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Handwashing signage was missing in back hand sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The ambient temperature of the salad/sandwich unit was observed held at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All foods were voluntarily disposed of. Unit must be serviced and maintained at a temperature of 41 degrees or below before use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Mixing bowl was observed in contact with lettuce. The top layer of lettuce was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
Refuse and debris was observed in the dumpster encloser. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Foam tubing observed over a food prep area that was in bad repair. The foam piece was taken off during inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
